distress_guild_echo.title: ◆ A Debt Repaid
distress_guild_echo.text: A relay message chases you down at the fuel dock — the mining guild whose people you pulled out of a dying shuttle, weeks back. They don't forget a rescue. Your registry is flagged friendly across their fuel stops for a season.
distress_guild_echo.log: ◆ The miners' guild remembers your rescue — friendly fuel prices follow you for a while.

remember.note: The miners' guild remembers you pulled their people out of the dark.

smuggle_the_bill.title: ◆ The Bill Comes Due
smuggle_the_bill.text: That no-questions crate you ran? It was seed stock for a narco-farm. The frontier town it poisoned has your registry number and a long memory. Word travels the lanes ahead of you now — the cantina goes quiet when you walk in.
smuggle_the_bill.log: ◆ The sealed freight you smuggled poisoned a frontier town. Your registry is known now, and not fondly (−3 prestige).

effects.rumor: "Heard that captain ran the seed stock that poisoned a whole frontier settlement. Wouldn't share a dock with 'em."

worldMemory.note: Somewhere out on the frontier, a town knows your registry and won't forget it.

pilgrim_star_chart.title: ◆ A Chart With No Sender
pilgrim_star_chart.text: A star chart arrives by relay: coordinates, no note, signed only with the little spiral symbol your pilgrim passenger kept drawing on every surface. It points somewhere past the edge of the charts. You don't know what's there. You suspect they didn't either — only that it mattered.
pilgrim_star_chart.log: ◆ The pilgrim you carried sent coordinates from nowhere, signed with their spiral symbol. A lead, filed for later.

effects.rumor: "Some captain's been asking about a spiral symbol and a set of coordinates past the Verge. Ghost stories, if you ask me."

remember.note: A pilgrim trusted you with coordinates to somewhere unnamed. You still have them.

pirate_grudge_return.title: ◆ Old Business
pirate_grudge_return.text: The comm crackles with a voice you've heard before — the pirate captain who limped away from your guns. They've re-armed, and this time your ship's name is painted on the missile.
pirate_grudge_return.log: ◆ A pirate you bested has come back for you, with a bigger ship and a grudge.

remember.note: Enemies compound out here. Friends do too.

rep_guardian_angel.title: ◆ A Kindness, Returned
rep_guardian_angel.text: A stranger hails you on a private band — a face you half-remember from a rescue you'd nearly forgotten. "You didn't leave us. Figured I'd return the favor before someone worse finds you out here." A fuel drop and a fat credit transfer follow, no strings.
rep_guardian_angel.log: ◆ Someone you once helped tracked you down to repay it — fuel, credits, and a warning.

remember.note: A stranger you helped came back to help you. It does come around.

rep_the_con.title: ◆ The Soft Touch
rep_the_con.text: The sob story was airtight — a widow, a sick child, just needed a small advance for medicine. You gave it gladly. Days later the docking manifest shows their "medical shuttle" was a Syndicate courier, and your "advance" bought a shipment of something you'd never have carried. They played your good heart like a fiddle.
rep_the_con.log: ◆ Your generosity got conned. Someone read you as a soft touch and took you for it (−250cr).

effects.rumor: "Word is that captain's an easy mark for a good sob story. Bring tissues and a story."

rep_vendetta.title: ◆ Blood Debt
rep_vendetta.text: A ship you don't recognize matches your burn and refuses every hail but one: "You killed my brother off the Verge lanes. Registry doesn't lie. I've been looking a long time." No bribe. No bargain. Just guns.
rep_vendetta.log: ◆ The kin of someone you killed finally caught up to you.

rep_merc_work.title: ◆ Professional Courtesy
rep_merc_work.text: A mercenary broker you've never met leaves a message at three ports running: "You've got a reputation for finishing things. We respect that. There's clean money in it for a captain who doesn't flinch." Attached: a retainer, paid up front, and a name to look up out past the frontier.
rep_merc_work.log: ◆ Your reputation for ruthlessness drew paying admirers — a mercenary retainer, cash up front.

effects.rumor: "Mercenary brokers are asking after that captain by name. Whatever they did, it impressed the wrong sort of people."

rep_union_privilege.title: ◆ Preferred Registry
rep_union_privilege.text: A Union liaison officer buys you a real coffee — the expensive kind — and slides a data-chit across the table. "Your record's spotless, Captain. The Union likes clean operators. Consider yourself expedited." Your registry's been flagged preferred: fewer scans, first pick of Union work, a small loyalty bonus.
rep_union_privilege.log: ◆ The Union flagged your clean record as a preferred registry — smoother scans and a bonus.

effects.rumor: "That captain's got the Union eating out of their hand. Clean as they come. Handy — or suspicious."

rep_syndicate_snub.title: ◆ No Friends in the Dark
rep_syndicate_snub.text: A Syndicate fixer catches you at the bar, all smiles and no warmth. "You're a good little law-abider, aren't you. Problem is, out past the buoys, it's us or nothing — and you've made it clear which you are." The shady, lucrative work stops finding you. Some doors just quietly shut.
rep_syndicate_snub.log: ◆ Your by-the-book reputation cost you: the Syndicate has blacklisted you (−4 Syndicate rep).

effects.rumor: "The Syndicate's writing that squeaky-clean captain off. No shady work coming their way anymore."

rep_syndicate_courtship.title: ◆ An Invitation
rep_syndicate_courtship.text: A bottle of real Earth whiskey arrives at your berth with a handwritten note: "You run our kind of freight, and you run it clean. The Red Sky remembers its friends. Keep flying like you fly — the good work will find you, and it pays." It's already paying: a finder's fee, and doors opening.
rep_syndicate_courtship.log: ◆ The Syndicate is courting you — a gift, a stipend, and better smuggling rates ahead.

effects.rumor: "The Red Sky's taken a shine to that captain. Their hidden-hold work pays double now, I hear."

rep_union_manhunt.title: ◆ On the List
rep_union_manhunt.text: A friendly dock clerk pulls you aside, nervous. "Your registry pinged a Union watch-flag when you berthed. Smuggling, evasion, the works. They're not arresting you today — but they've stopped pretending you're nobody. Watch the lanes." Out on the frontier, though, an outlaw's name earns a certain respect.
rep_union_manhunt.log: ◆ The Union has flagged you as a wanted operator (−4 Union rep). Patrols will be uglier now.

effects.rumor: "That captain made a Union watchlist. Frontier folk buy 'em drinks for it."

rep_legend_grows.title: ◆ The Stories They Tell
rep_legend_grows.text: A grizzled prospector corners you, wide-eyed. "You're the one who flies the runs nobody comes back from. Listen — I've been sitting on something too big for a careful captain. A wreck, deep out, still holding its cargo. Nobody dares. But you..." He presses a fragment of coordinates into your hand. It's not the whole picture. It's a start.
rep_legend_grows.log: ◆ Your daredevil reputation earned you a lead: a rumored deep-space wreck, coordinates incomplete.

effects.rumor: "Somebody handed that reckless captain a piece of a treasure map. Deep-black salvage. Fools and legends, same coin."

rep_pushed_luck.title: ◆ The Odds Catch Up
rep_pushed_luck.text: You've been running hot for weeks — skipping margins, taking the risky vector, betting the hull would hold one more time. This time the dice come up wrong: a debris field you'd normally route around, taken at speed to save a day, opens a long gash down the flank. Everyone's fine. The ship is not.
rep_pushed_luck.log: ◆ Weeks of pushing your luck finally cost you — a hard hit to the hull.

remember.note: The black always collects, eventually. It collected.

rep_trusted_hauler.title: ◆ Safe Hands
rep_trusted_hauler.text: A cautious old merchant seeks you out precisely because you're cautious too. "I've watched you, Captain. You don't lose cargo. You don't take mad risks. That's worth more to me than fast." He fronts you a consignment of premium goods on trust and a generous cut — the kind of deal that only goes to captains who never lose a shipment.
rep_trusted_hauler.log: ◆ A merchant trusts your careful reputation with premium cargo and a generous cut.

effects.rumor: "That careful captain? Merchants trust 'em with the good cargo. Slow, sure, and never loses a crate."

rep_passed_over.title: ◆ The Bolder Captain
rep_passed_over.text: You hear about the score secondhand, after the fact — a fat, dangerous contract that would've set you up for a season. It went to some hotshot who didn't think twice. "Offered it to you first," the broker shrugs. "Figured you'd want the sure thing. No offense." None taken. Mostly.
rep_passed_over.log: ◆ A lucrative, risky job went to a bolder captain — they didn't think you'd take it (−1 prestige).

remember.note: Careful keeps you alive. It also lets the bold ones eat first.
